title: The Straw Hats Crash In
description: On pages 11–14, the straw hats crash in focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as luffy, Zoro, Sanji, and Usopp answer Nami’s plea and march toward Arlong Park together.
scene: On pages 11–14, the straw hats crash in focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as luffy, Zoro, Sanji, and Usopp answer Nami’s plea and march toward Arlong Park together.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Aghhhh! Arlong???

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Help me...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Just what the hell...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't you dare,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Make my Naviga- for cry!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Why you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How dare you...!

dialogue.speaker: Kuroobi
dialogue.text: Small fries can just get the hell back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Guahhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Jeez... Running in head-first alone like that.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Don't worry, I ain't gonna lose!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Dumbass! When did I ever say I was worried for you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I only meant that you shouldn't hog all the glory for yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I D-Don't par- ticularly mind either W-W- way, Luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Ain't you gutsy?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: RORDOA ZORO...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That's him! the one who tricked me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How dare he take me for a ride... no, wait. I was the one who actually gave him a ride!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That long-nosed human is... still alive!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: He should've been dead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: pirates, huh... I see... so that's how you're all related.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Hey! Just who exactly are those guys!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: To be able to send Arlong's gigantic body flying back with a punch...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That's not something a normal human could do!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: those guys...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: If even those guys can't do any- thing about these fishmen,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Then East Blue has no future!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: If you still wish to interfere with this fight, then you'll have to kill us first!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: For what reason...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Do you two go so far...?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Because they made sister Nami cry.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Is this not the best reason to risk our lives?

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
